MARGINAL GAINS

Elitewheels is a big proponent of marginal gains and knows that many small improvements can add up. Because of this, the Velo TT wheel incorporates a valve cutout cover that the rider can choose to use. Wind tunnel testing has shown that it can save the precious seconds in a time trial.

As compared to our previous TT wheels, the new Velo TT features a wider internal rim width without compromising the wheel’s aerodynamics. This allows for wider tires to be used, improving comfort on long time trials and less than optimal road surfaces as well as increasing grip in wet conditions.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”9949″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Velo TT Disc PMI CORE”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1731738900728{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PMI CORE

The interior is consists of a lightweight, high-density aerospace PMI (polymethacrylimide) foam core. It offers all of the benefits of honeycomb type cores but with improved strength and impact resistance.

As opposed to using other core materials, our specially machined PMI allows us to design a lighter weight wheel that is exceptionally stiff. It is also fatigue resistant, so you can continue to use the wheel season after season, without any loss in performance.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”9952″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Velo TT Disc HUB” css=”.vc_custom_1724896522420{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745725896832{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

The front and rear hubs are made of 7075 aluminum which is known for it’s high strength. They both incorporate Enduro bearings. The lightweight freehub uses a 36t ratchet system.

excerpt.rendered:
The Velo TT is designed to give you the marginal gains you need to race against the clock in time trials and triathlons.

A high-performance wheel needs to look good. The wheel features a minimalistic UD carbon weave that is pleasing to the eyes.

When it comes to racing, we believe that every second counts. In our opinion, a good disc wheel should be more than aerodynamic.

*Instructions for the first assembly: Tubeless tires must be ridden for at least 25 km directly after the sealant is added so as to ensure they are air tight.

*Availability Status: On Backorder, usually shipped in 20-30 days.

MARGINAL GAINS

Elitewheels is a big proponent of marginal gains and knows that many small improvements can add up. Because of this, the Velo TT wheel incorporates a valve cutout cover that the rider can choose to use. Wind tunnel testing has shown that it can save the precious seconds in a time trial.

As compared to our previous TT wheels, the new Velo TT features a wider internal rim width without compromising the wheel’s aerodynamics. This allows for wider tires to be used, improving comfort on long time trials and less than optimal road surfaces as well as increasing grip in wet conditions.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”9967″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Velo TT Rim PMI CORE”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1731738959089{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PMI CORE

The interior is consists of a lightweight, high-density aerospace PMI (polymethacrylimide) foam core. It offers all of the benefits of honeycomb type cores but with improved strength and impact resistance.

As opposed to using other core materials, our specially machined PMI allows us to design a lighter weight wheel that is exceptionally stiff. It is also fatigue resistant, so you can continue to use the wheel season after season, without any loss in performance.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”9965″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Velo TT Rim HUB” css=”.vc_custom_1659348005426{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745725869664{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

The front and rear hubs are made of 7075 aluminum which is known for it’s high strength. They both incorporate Enduro bearings. The lightweight freehub uses a 36t ratchet system.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”9964″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Velo TT Rim BRAKING SURFACE” css=”.vc_custom_1659348038241{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1708498945876{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

BRAKING SURFACE

The Velo TT Rim’s braking surface uses a blend of high-temperature resin developed by Elitewheels and Japanese Toray T800 carbon fiber. This ensures safe and effective braking even on long descents.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

Synergy

Our philosophy is that wheels should be complimentary. For this reason, we have created a complete time trial and triathlon wheelset.

Our Velo TT Rim wheel comes as the result of our years of research and design into aero time trial wheels. It is our next-generation offering is designed to provide marginal gains, saving you precious time.

The Velo 8 is an 82mm, deep-section wheel that builds off what we have developed before. It is our solution for what a high-performance TT wheel should be.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”11073″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”TT Rim Brake Bundle Aerodynamics”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1731739009480{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Aerodynamics

While disc wheels are accepted as being the most aero choices, not all are made the same. The wheel comes with a new valve hole cover that makes the wheel even more streamline.

It is well known that the wheel, tire combination can have a significant impact on aerodynamics. The Velo TT Rim and Velo 8 are both designed to optimized to be used with wider road tires. To get the maximum aerodynamic benefit, we recommend they are used with 23mm or 25mm tires.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”11075″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”TT Rim Brake Bundle Tech” css=”.vc_custom_1663917783513{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1663921615050{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Tech

The Velo TT Rim is a next generation TT wheel that offers more than just aerodynamics. Its specially machined high-density aerospace PMI core not only serves the purpose of making the wheel light, but also exceptionally stiff. As opposed to the typical honeycomb-type core used in many disc wheels, the PMI core allows it to be stronger and more resistant to impacts. It is fatigue resistant, meaning you can continue to use it season after season with out any drop in performance.

The Velo 8’s hub features 6803 ceramic bearings to reduce rolling resistance, saving you watts. The wheel also incorporates a U/V rim profile that isn’t strictly focuses on aerodynamics. Deep section wheels are more susceptible to crosswinds. Having this design will help you maintain control regardless of the conditions.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

RIMS

Drive 50D II Anniversary Edition wheelsets feature wider, 23mm inner widths and 31mm outer widths, making them aerodynamically optimized for 28c and 30c tires. Wider tires allow for a more comfortable ride, as they can be run at lower pressures. The wider inner rim width gives wider tires a better shape, improving grip and comfort, while the 31mm external widths improve the overall aerodynamics when paired with 28mm or 30mm tires, which are now the norm in road cycling.

What makes our clincher, tubeless-ready rims unique is that we use a reduced hook design. We see the benefits and drawbacks of standard hooked as well as hookless rims and have found a way to offer the best of both worlds. Our ETRTO-compliant reduced hooks allow for the aerodynamic, durability, and optimal tire shape that hookless rims provide with the security, tire compatibility, and ability to run higher pressures that a clincher can offer.

Despite the increase in widths, we were able to keep the same weights as the original Drive wheelsets. This was accomplished in part due to our new advancements in our UNI carbon fiber layup technology.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”51724″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1757208234256{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

In the Drive 50D II Anniversary Edition wheels, we are using 4.5mm aero bladed carbon spokes. As opposed bonded carbon spokes, ours are as easily replaceable as their steel counterparts. Each spoke weighs roughly 3 grams each. In our laboratory testing, they have proven to be 8% more laterally stiff than steel spoke, leading to more efficient power transfer when riding, saving you watts.

The carbon spokes on the Drive II wheelsets do not experience spoke twist, meaning they will always remain in the most aerodynamic position, guaranteeing you always get the same high level of performance. Our carbon spokes have been proven reliable and durable for over three years in the pro peloton by our sponsored UCI ProTeam and Continental teams.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”51722″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1757208254041{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

KINETIC RATCHET HUB

The Drive 50D II Anniversary Edition road wheelsets features our brand new, Kinetic hub, which uses a 50T star ratchet mechanism,instead of the previous pawl-ratchet mechanism. Kinetic’s ratchets are machined in a conical shape, allowing for increased engagement surface area which increases longevity. A new, stronger spring reduces the likelihood of skipping and slipping, ensuring a consistent riding experience.

The hub also features a new waterproof seal reducing the likelihood of ingress. A stronger spring has also been chosen, which significantly reduces the incidence of ratchets slipping and skipping when pedaling.

Just like all of our other designs, the Kinetic hub is made by us using 5-axis CNC machines. High-grade precision S&S ceramic bearings were chosen to improve their lifespan and reduce rolling resistance, saving you precious watts. While having high quality bearings is important, a perfect bearing seat fit is essential for optimal performance. Our CNC machines precisely machine bearing seats to 0.02mm tolerances, guaranteeing exceptionally low rolling resistance and improving longevity.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”64079″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1742454692194{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

TESTING

At Elitewheels, we see value in ensuring what we offer not only performs well but has excellent durability and longevity. Each wheelset undergoes more than 20+ laboratory tests at our factory including various durability, longevity, and stiffness tests. We also ensure each wheel passes the UCI Vertical Impact Test, which gives the green light for wheels to be used at the top levels of professional racing.

Besides the laboratory tests, we put a strong emphasis on aerodynamic and real world testing. Our engineers run CFD (Computational Fluid Dyamics) programs for hundreds of hours during the design phase to aerodynamically optimize wheelsets before even producing the first prototype. After our engineering team is satisfied and the prototype is ready, we conduct wind tunnel testing to verify the results as well as real world testing by our staff and our sponsored UCI pro cycling teams, getting as much feedback as possible. The pro riders offer a unique perspective due to their hundreds of thousands of kilometers of riding experience with a large number of wheelsets.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1692596541997{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1692597610063{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″ css=”.vc_custom_1692597636464{background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1692597620719{background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1704865934342{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

excerpt.rendered:
To celebrate the 10th anniversary of Elitewheels, we have partnered with the Team Solution Tech – Vini Fantini Pro Team to launch a special Anniversary Edition of the Drive 50D II wheelset. The only difference from the standard Drive 50D II is its unique colored decal, inspired by the team’s iconic logo colors, offering a fresh visual interpretation of elite speed.

Furthermore, each anniversary wheelset comes in a specially customized 10th-anniversary packaging box and includes a complimentary anniversary gift worth USD 100.

The same with Drive 50D II, Drive 50D II Anniversary Edition (hereinafter referred to as the Drive 50D II AE) was designed to be the perfect all-round racing wheelset, balancing weight and aerodynamics. It weighs just 1300 grams for the pair. The UV-shaped rim profile improves lateral airflow, increasing stability on fast descents and in windy conditions.

In addition to optimizing the rim design, the second generation of Drive wheels comes with several upgrades, namely ETRTO-compliant reduced hooks to offer better aerodynamics, comfort, and traction, quality S&S ceramic bearings, 4.5mm carbon spokes, and our one-of-a-kind Kinetic hub, which features a conical ratchet design.

– Intended Use: Road
– Carbon Spoke Wheelset
– Disc Brake Wheelset
– Brake Interface: Center Lock by default
– Axle: Thru axle by default (Need QR adapters?)

*Availability Status: Out Of Stock.

The Kreuza Apex handlebar uses T800 carbon fiber material and weighs just 305g (Painted) for the 38cm version with 110mm integrated stem. It offers 18 different combinations of widths and stem lengths. Widths range from 360mm to 400mm, while stem lengths go from 90mm to 140mm.

The handlebars feature an innovative and aerodynamic Kammtail Airfoil design, measuring just 16mm at its narrowest. The design has been aerodynamically optimized using Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) analysis, saving 4.5 watts over a traditional round handlebar and stem for unparalleled performance.

RIMS

Our innovative rim makes use of our unique UNI technology (Learn more about our UNI technology here).

The Drive G45 CS wheelset uses a U-shaped rim which has the aerodynamic advantages of a road wheel. It’s 24mm inner rim width supports 700x28c-65C tires. This flexibility allows for road riding or trail riding. The G45 CS is truly a force to be reckoned with regardless of the riding you do. The glossy marble carbon fiber design gives the wheelset a unique and striking appearance.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”8874″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive G45 Carbon Spoke Gravel Wheelset Disc brake Hubs” css=”.vc_custom_1653902221866{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745725449586{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

HUB

The Drive G45 CS wheelset includes a custom, high-end hub that uses a double-walled waterproof design. The hub flanges have been specifically designed to be simple and practical in form. This makes for easy cleaning of the hub after riding in muddy conditions.

As the hub uses premium ceramic bearings for less rolling resistance. Using these allows for a much longer service life as compared to steel bearings.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”8876″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive G45 Carbon Spoke Gravel Wheelset Disc brake Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1653902291081{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1694481862727{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

Drive G45 CS uses high modulus carbon fiber spokes. The wheels are 7% stiffer than a comparable wheelset using steel spokes. This difference in stiffness is immediately apparent when out for a ride. Carbon spokes are also three times more fatigue resistant than their steel counterparts. The loss of tension experienced riding steel spokes with long-term use can essentially be avoided.

*Read more about CARBON SPOKES.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”8878″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive G45 Carbon Spoke Gravel Wheelset Disc brake Durability” css=”.vc_custom_1653902367893{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1655968406616{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

DURABILITY

The wheelset has flawlessly passed our 20,000km rough surface factory/laboratory tests which simulate gravel riding conditions. This far exceeds the en17406 test standard.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”12032″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1668761782509{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”in the box disc brake drive”][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

DRIVE RIMS

A Elitewheels, we design our Drive wheels to match the needs of professional riders. In order to deliver the best, we incorporate our own in-house UNI carbon fiber, a specific ratio of T700 and T800 carbon fiber (*Read more about UNI technology), making it not only strong, but also especially light and stiff. The U/V-shaped rim profile of the Drive RB Mixed Depth wheels was chosen to make the rims aero as well as stable in windy conditions. The wheels are designed to accommodate up to 30c tires for those looking for more grip and comfort.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”64733″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V wheelset Carbon Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1757488741471{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1710396089109{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CARBON SPOKES

What separates Drive wheels from most others is its use of high-modulus carbon spokes. The 3.2mm wide aero bladed spokes offer a 7% increase lateral response as compared to equivalent steel spokes. The spokes are mechanically secured, giving the benefit of being able to be trued and maintained just like regular spokes. Anti-loosening technology is also incorporated into the spoke nipples. The threads built into the nipples give it a double-locking effect.

Read more about CARBON SPOKES.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”64720″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V wheelset Performance hub” css=”.vc_custom_1757488755760{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1747278725194{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

To get the most out of carbon fiber spokes, we specifically designed the hubs with high flanges to further increase lateral stiffness and improve handling. Elitewheels manufactures its own hubs with Fanuc CNC machines, allowing for a tolerance of 0.02mm. This accuracy is important for bearing longevity and low rolling resistance.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”64734″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V wheelset Ceramic Bearings” css=”.vc_custom_1757488794502{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1697620146125{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CERAMIC BEARINGS

The Drive front hub uses two 6803 mixed ceramic bearings. The Drive rear hub uses one 6903 and three 6803 mixed ceramic bearings. These large bearings offer better rigidity. The use of mixed ceramic bearings will allow you to have a more efficient bike, saving you precious watts.

Read more about Ceramic Bearings.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”64749″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V wheelset Brake surface” css=”.vc_custom_1757493630492{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1757497449622{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

BRAKE SURFACE

The Drive RB Mixed Depth uses a blend of 270 ℃, high-temperature resin, developed by Elitewheels, and Japanese Toray T800 carbon fiber for the brake surface. This heat resistance ensures excellent braking performance even on long, steep descents.

It features an advanced 3K 45° twill weave carbon fiber brake surface, engineered for superior braking performance and durability. Unlike traditional unidirectional (UD) layups, the cross-oriented fiber structure delivers balanced resistance to both lateral and longitudinal forces, ensuring consistent power and control in harsh conditions.

The 45° angled weave promotes efficient heat dissipation, effectively limiting localized overheating and maintaining stable braking efficiency at high temperatures. Additionally, the interlaced fiber pattern enhances wear resistance, reducing abrasion from brake pads while inhibiting crack propagation for longer-lasting performance.

Paired with a precisely textured friction surface, this system contributes to reliable, fade-free braking, ride after ride.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

excerpt.rendered:
Having a mixed depth wheelset can improve the aerodynamics and handling of a bike. A shallower front wheel can make a bike easier to control as it is more resistant to crosswinds, while a deep section rear wheel can reduce aerodynamic drag. Mixed depth wheels are the favorite or many pro and experienced riders, as it can make for a more balanced ride.

Now we give riders the choice to customize their own wheelset, allowing for the front and rear wheel rim depths to be selected independently.

*To ensure that the wheels are compatible with your bike and to prevent any rubbing, the brake pads should be at least 2mm away from the rim’s braking surface on both sides. We recommend checking with your frame and brake caliper manufacturers for the maximum tire clearance before placing your order.

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days

Whether sprinting at high speed or powering through long training sessions, the KREUZA Slice Aerodynamic Water Bottle combines top-tier performance with distinctive design.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”8905″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1654047008906{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”all mountain wheels 29ER PRO36″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”7936″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Elitewheels 29ER PRO33 Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745725343582{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

RIM

During the rim production process, internal inflatable bladders from a special material are used to produce smoother walls, resulting in a lighter rim. These bladders are then completely removed without the use of harsh chemicals through the valve hole. Our unique manufacturing process makes is so that the rim does not have to be patched to extract the bladders like traditional manufacturers. This significantly improves the strength of the rims.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”7935″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Elitewheels 29ER PRO33 Rim type” css=”.vc_custom_1648536049468{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1663127242486{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

RIM TYPE

We use both genuine Toray T700 and T800 carbon fiber which is superior to generic carbon fiber used by many manufacturers. The two types of carbon fiber are used in different places to increase the wheel’s strength to weight ratio while reducing lateral and radial forces as well as increasing impact resistance.

The rims have also been specifically designed to make sealing tubeless tires using a floor pump easy.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”7934″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Elitewheels 29ER PRO33 Hub” css=”.vc_custom_1648536077834{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745725352015{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

HUB

The Elitewheels Pro hub comes standard and features Taiwanese TPI bearings. Both the front and rear hubs are made of 7075 aluminum alloy. The lightweight freebody features a ratchet system with 36 teeth.

DT Swiss hubs are also available.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”4599″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Elitewheels 29ER PRO33 Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1637548547636{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1663126929590{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

Sapim CX-Ray spokes come standard. We take precautions to ensure that spoke windup is minimized so wheels don’t go out of true. After the initial truing, the wheel is sideloaded. This process is repeated again. The wheels are sideloaded a total of 16 times. We see this as an essential quality control standard. As a result, our wheels are guaranteed to stay within 0.2mm of true.

The 2.8mm spoke offset minimizes the right and left spoke tension difference. This makes for a stonger and more laterally stiff wheel giving you more control.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”14346″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1677228281111{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”29er Gnar Trail Emtb Carbon Wheelset”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”14347″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar Trail Emtb Carbon Wheelset Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1690774676051{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

RIM

Elitewheels has left no stone unturned when designing the 29er Gnar Trail’s rim. The asymmetric rim profile of the 29er Gnar Trail leads to better stress balance, greater lateral stiffness, and strength at the spoke holes.

38 layers of carbon fiber are placed at each spoke hole to offer reinforcement. This further improves the strength and stiffness of the rim. The rim bead has been made 17% thicker to improve impact resistance

In addition, during the rim production process, internal inflatable bladders from a special material are used to produce smoother walls, eliminating wrinkles and voids, allowing for an even stronger and more reliable rim that can be made lighter, as over-engineering is not necessary. We use genuine Toray T700 and T800 carbon fiber, which is superior to generic varieties in terms of weight and impact resistance.

But these are not just words. Using our custom impact test rig, we can demonstrate how the rim’s design and manufacture stacks up. The measured impact energy (J) at first sign of failure is 126 Joules, giving you peace of mind that the Gnar Trail 29er truly is a rugged wheel.

The rims are designed to make fitting tubeless hookless wheels simple, requiring just a floor pump.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”14348″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar Trail Emtb Carbon Wheelset Hub” css=”.vc_custom_1677228575902{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1688635450592{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

HUB

The Elitewheels Frequency hubs are made of 6061 aluminum alloy and feature S&S 6903(Hubs), S&S 17287(Freehub) Bearing. These large bearings in the front and rear hubs offer an increased contact area, providing a better force distribution, resulting in lower rolling resistance and better durability.

Both the front and rear hubs are forged and then machined using our own Fanuc CNC equipment. The rear hub features an engagement system of 8 pawls and 80 ratchets. Pawls are staggered into 4 groups of 2 pawls. The other pawls are simultaneously preloaded. This allows for 320 true points (or 1.125º)  of engagement. This means exceptionally fast and efficient power transfer no matter the riding you do. Each pawl has two claws, spreading the driving force over a larger surface area, therefore maximizing the contact points and extending the life of the freehub.

Hub servicing has been made easy with no need for special tools.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”14349″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar Trail Emtb Carbon Wheelset Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1677228622494{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1677741727557{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

Sapim CX-Ray spokes come standard. We take precautions to ensure that spoke windup is minimized, so wheels don’t go out of true. After the initial truing, the wheel is stress relieved. This process is repeated again. The wheels are stress relieved a total of 16 times. We see this as an essential quality control standard. As a result, our wheels are guaranteed to stay within 0.2mm of true.

The 3.5mm spoke offset minimizes the right and left spoke tension difference. This makes for a stronger and more laterally stiff wheel, giving you more control.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”14350″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar Trail Emtb Carbon Wheelset” css=”.vc_custom_1677228662433{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1690774700603{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

EMTB

The 29er Gnar Trail has been designed to be used on eMTBs. In order to deal with the additional stresses wheels are subjected to during eMTB riding, this wheelset has been designed from the ground up. The rear wheel has been carefully engineered to handle the additional torque from an electric motor. Extra reinforcement has also been added to improve impact resistance when encountering obstacles.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

DRIVE RIMS

At Elitewheels, we design our Drive wheels to match the needs of professional riders. In order to deliver the best performance, we incorporate our own UNI carbon fiber, a specific ratio of T800 and T1000 carbon fiber (*Read more about UNI technology), making rims not only strong, but also exceptionally light and stiff. The U/V-shaped rim profile of the Drive 65V was chosen to make the rim both aero as well as stable in windy conditions. The Drive 65V’s 21mm inner rim allows for wider tires to be run, allowing for more comfort and grip.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”64733″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 65V Elitewheels Carbon Spoke Rim Brake Wheelset”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1687764681017{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CARBON SPOKES

What separates the Drive 65V from most other wheels is its use of high-modulus carbon spokes. They are 3.2mm wide aero bladed spokes, offering 7% more lateral stiffness as compared to equivalent steel spokes. The carbon spokes are mechanically secured, giving the benefit of being able to be trued and maintained just like regular steel spokes. Anti-loosening technology is also incorporated into the spoke nipples. The threads built into the nipples give them a double-locking effect.

*Read more about CARBON SPOKES.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”64720″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 65V Elitewheels Carbon Spoke Rim Brake Wheelset”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1747278704044{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUBS

To get the most out of carbon fiber spokes, we specifically designed the hub with high flanges to further increase lateral stiffness and improve handling. Elitewheels manufactures its own high precision hubs with Fanuc CNC machines, which can machine to tolerances of just 0.02mm. This not only allows for lower rolling resistance but also increases bearing longevity.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”64734″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 65V Elitewheels Carbon Spoke Rim Brake Wheelset”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1684132714246{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CERAMIC BEARINGS

The 65V’s front hub uses two 6803 mixed ceramic bearings. The rear hub uses one 6903 and three 6803 mixed ceramic bearings. These large bearings offer better rigidity. The use of mixed ceramic bearings will allow you to have a more efficient bike, saving you precious watts.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”65267″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 65V Elitewheels Carbon Spoke Rim Brake Wheelset”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1757485705259{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

BRAKE SURFACE

The Drive 65V uses a blend of 270 ℃, high-temperature resin, developed by Elitewheels, and Japanese Toray T800 carbon fiber for the brake surface. This heat resistance ensures excellent braking performance even on long, steep descents.

It features an advanced 3K 45° twill weave carbon fiber brake surface, engineered for superior braking performance and durability. Unlike traditional unidirectional (UD) layups, the cross-oriented fiber structure delivers balanced resistance to both lateral and longitudinal forces, ensuring consistent power and control in harsh conditions.

The 45° angled weave promotes efficient heat dissipation, effectively limiting localized overheating and maintaining stable braking efficiency at high temperatures. Additionally, the interlaced fiber pattern enhances wear resistance, reducing abrasion from brake pads while inhibiting crack propagation for longer-lasting performance.

Paired with a precisely textured friction surface, this system contributes to reliable, fade-free braking, ride after ride.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

The Drive 65V is dedicated to those who want an all-rounder that is more geared towards riding in the hills and mountains. The wheelset features carbon spokes, light and stiff UNI carbon fiber as well as high precision, ceramic bearing hubs. It is also tubeless-ready. The Drive 65V is for those who want a pro-level wheelset.

To enhance braking performance, the Drive 65V upgraded the original UD brake track to a 3K 45°twill weave carbon fiber brake surface engineered for superior stopping power and long-lasting durability. As a result, the total weight has been adjusted to 1540g for the pair.

– Carbon Spoke Wheelset
– Rim Brake Wheelset

*To ensure that the wheels are compatible with your bike and to prevent any rubbing, the brake pads should be at least 2mm away from the rim’s braking surface on both sides. We recommend checking with your frame and brake caliper manufacturers for the maximum tire clearance before placing your order.

– Custom option for different rim depths

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”5778″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1639202807202{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”64748″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1711675654203{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

DRIVE RIMS

At Elitewheels, we design our Drive wheels to match the needs of professional riders. In order to deliver the best performance, we incorporate our own UNI carbon fiber, a specific ratio of T800 and T1000 carbon fiber (*Read more about UNI technology), making rims not only strong, but also exceptionally light and stiff. The U/V-shaped rim profile of the Drive 50V was chosen to make the rim both aero as well as stable in windy conditions.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”64733″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V wheelset Carbon Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1757488238154{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1687764964185{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CARBON SPOKES

What separates the Drive 50V from most other wheels is its use of high-modulus carbon spokes. They are 3.2mm wide aero bladed spokes, offering 7% more lateral stiffness as compared to equivalent steel spokes. The carbon spokes are mechanically secured, giving the benefit of being able to be trued and maintained just like regular steel spokes. Anti-loosening technology is also incorporated into the spoke nipples. The threads built into the nipples give them a double-locking effect.

Read more about CARBON SPOKES.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”64720″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V wheelset Performance hub” css=”.vc_custom_1757488209269{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1747278667365{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

To get the most out of carbon fiber spokes, we specifically designed the hub with high flanges to further increase lateral stiffness and improve handling. Elitewheels manufactures its own high precision hubs with Fanuc CNC machines, which can machine to tolerances of just 0.02mm. This not only allows for lower rolling resistance but also increases bearing longevity.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”64734″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V wheelset Ceramic Bearings” css=”.vc_custom_1757488264748{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1670405443894{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CERAMIC BEARINGS

The 50V’s front hub uses two 6803 mixed ceramic bearings. The rear hub uses one 6903 and three 6803 mixed ceramic bearings. These large bearings offer better rigidity. The use of mixed ceramic bearings will allow you to have a more efficient bike, saving you precious watts.

Read more about Ceramic Bearings.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”65267″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 50V wheelset Brake surface” css=”.vc_custom_1758012977635{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1757474749794{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

BRAKE SURFACE

The Drive 50V uses a blend of 270 ℃, high-temperature resin, developed by Elitewheels, and Japanese Toray T800 carbon fiber for the brake surface. This heat resistance ensures excellent braking performance even on long, steep descents.

It features an advanced 3K 45° twill weave carbon fiber brake surface, engineered for superior braking performance and durability. Unlike traditional unidirectional (UD) layups, the cross-oriented fiber structure delivers balanced resistance to both lateral and longitudinal forces, ensuring consistent power and control in harsh conditions.

The 45° angled weave promotes efficient heat dissipation, effectively limiting localized overheating and maintaining stable braking efficiency at high temperatures. Additionally, the interlaced fiber pattern enhances wear resistance, reducing abrasion from brake pads while inhibiting crack propagation for longer-lasting performance.

Paired with a precisely textured friction surface, this system contributes to reliable, fade-free braking, ride after ride.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

In order to provide riders with the best wheelsets, we seek to update and improve them as technology advances. Elitewheels reserves the right to change, add or remove the information contained on this website at any time, including equipment, specifications, models, colors, materials, and pricing, without prior notice. The shipped products will be based on the actual order information. Elitewheels thanks you for your understanding and support.

excerpt.rendered:
The Drive 40V is dedicated to those who want an all-rounder that is more geared towards riding in the hills and mountains. The wheelset features carbon spokes, light and stiff UNI carbon fiber as well as high precision, ceramic bearing hubs. It is also tubeless-ready. The Drive 40V is for those who want a pro-level wheelset.

To enhance braking performance, the Drive 40V upgraded the original UD brake track to a 3K 45°twill weave carbon fiber brake surface engineered for superior stopping power and long-lasting durability. As a result, the total weight has been adjusted to 1299g for the pair.

– Carbon Spoke Wheelset
– Rim Brake Wheelset

*To ensure that the wheels are compatible with your bike and to prevent any rubbing, the brake pads should be at least 2mm away from the rim’s braking surface on both sides. We recommend checking with your frame and brake caliper manufacturers for the maximum tire clearance before placing your order.

– Custom option for different rim depths

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”31338″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1711345321161{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”DRIVE Helix 68D Banner”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”31343″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 68D Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1753874863177{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Rims

In designing the Drive Helix 68D CS wheelset, the goal was to create something that ticked all of the boxes. It had to not only be aero, light, laterally stiff, strong, but also crosswind resistant. To accomplish this, we used our in-house UNI carbon fiber, which is a mixture of our custom resin and genuine Japanese Toray T800 and T1000 carbon fiber. It allows our wheels to be stiff, light, and strong enough to go far beyond the UCI’s vertical impact test. Our patented undulating rim design draws inspiration from the tubercle effect found widely in nature, allowing for a significant improvement in stability in windy conditions.

The wheels are aerodynamically optimized for 700 x 28-30c tires. The front wheel’s wider 31.8mm external width improves airflow around the rim, offering further stability in crosswinds. Both the front and rear rim depths were also chosen specifically to meet the needs of road riders. The Drive Helix 68D CS’s mixed depth wheels allow for the best of both worlds when it comes to aerodynamics, weight, and control.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”31321″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 68D Carbon Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1711345472121{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1723775859083{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Spokes

No stone was left unturned when designing the Drive Helix 68D CS wheelset. Newer, more aerodynamic carbon spokes were selected without sacrificing weight or durability, allowing them to remain approximately 3 grams each. These 5.2mm spokes are the most aerodynamic of their kind available.

What makes our spokes special is that unlike bonded carbon fiber spokes, these are replaceable just like traditional steel spokes. Using a more advanced design, Drive Helix CS spokes do not experience spoke twist, so they are always in the most aerodynamic orientation and do not lose spoke tension over time.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”60839″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 68D hub” css=”.vc_custom_1753087594437{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1753067527370{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Surface Hub

What makes the Surface hub unique is its star ratchet freehub mechanism, which has been tried and tested for years on our MTB and TT wheelsets. Just like all of our other designs, the Surface hub is made by us using 5-axis CNC machines. High-grade precision S&S ceramic bearings were chosen to improve their lifespan and reduce rolling resistance, saving you precious watts. While having high quality bearings is important, a perfect bearing seat fit is essential for optimal performance. Our CNC machines precisely machine bearing seats to 0.02mm tolerances, guaranteeing exceptionally low rolling resistance and improving longevity.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”31322″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 68D” css=”.vc_custom_1711345558510{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1719305971479{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Aerodynamic Testing

At Elitewheels, we see value in ensuring what we offer performs rather than just looking good on paper. In addition to the 20+ laboratory test at our factory, we also employ CFD testing as well as real world testing by our pro teams and riders.

CFD (Computational Fluid Dynamics) allows us to aerodynamically optimize wheelsets before even producing the first prototype. During the design phase, we conduct a series of advanced computer simulations that take hundreds of hours each. After our engineering team is satisfied, we are ready for stress testing in our lab.

Once the development of our wheels is finished, we not only test the wheels out ourselves, but we also send them to professional cyclists. We are working with our sponsored UCI continental pro teams and riders, getting their feedback. Their experience riding hundreds of thousands of kilometers each with a large number of wheelsets gives us a unique perspective.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”37859″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1724060481924{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”in the box disc brake drive”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

The shipped products will be based on the actual order information. Elitewheels thanks you for your understanding and support.

excerpt.rendered:
The Drive Helix 68D CS was designed to be the perfect aero deep-section wheelset. Being part of our first ultra-premium wheel series, it has been optimized for not only fast riding, but also stability in the windiest of conditions.

Drawing inspiration from our popular Drive road wheels, the 68D CS uses replaceable carbon spokes, UNI carbon fiber, and S&S ceramic bearings. What sets these new wheels apart isn’t just the Star Ratchet Hub and improved carbon spoke design, but also our innovative undulating rim design, whose unique profile results in helical-shaped laminar flow when out riding.

– Carbon Spoke Wheelset
– Disc Brake Wheelset
– Brake Interface: Center Lock by default
– Axle: Thru axle by default (Need QR adapters?)

*Availability Status:  Usually shipped in 7-10 days.;

Rims

In designing the Drive Helix 68D SS wheelset, the goal was to create something that ticked all of the boxes, but at a more competitive price. It had to not only be aero, light, laterally stiff, strong, but also crosswind resistant. To accomplish this, we used our in-house UNI carbon fiber, which is a mixture of our custom resin and genuine Japanese Toray T800 and T1000 carbon fiber. It allows our wheels to be stiff, light, and strong enough to go far beyond the UCI’s vertical impact test. Our patented undulating rim design draws inspiration from the tubercle effect found widely in nature, allowing for a significant improvement in stability in windy conditions.

The wheels are aerodynamically optimized for 700 x 28-30c tires. The front wheel’s wider 31.8mm external width improves airflow around the rim, offering further stability in crosswinds. Both the front and rear rim depths were also chosen specifically to meet the needs of road riders. The Drive Helix 68D SS’s mixed depth wheels allow for the best of both worlds when it comes to aerodynamics, weight, and control.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”37842″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 68D SS Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1724039523317{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1724656381504{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Spokes

No stone was left unturned when designing the Drive Helix 68D SS wheelset. Lightweight Sapim CX-Ray aero bladed spokes are excellent when it comes to performance and strength, while weighing just 4.4 grams each on average.

What makes our spokes special is that they are not only ubiquitous at bike shops around the world, but also trusted and raced by professional road, gravel, and MTB riders around the world. They have a proven track record, and when it comes to steel spokes, Sapim CX-Rays are simply the best.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”37840″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 68D SS Hub” css=”.vc_custom_1724039572433{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745725027645{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Performance Hubs

What makes the Surface hub unique is its star ratchet engagement system, which we have been using for years on our MTB and TT wheelsets. Just like all of our other hubs, the Surface hub is made by us with 5-axis CNC machines.

High grade precision TPI steel bearings were chosen to improve longevity and reduce rolling resistance. TPI bearings are precise and have low rolling resistance, making them on par with even some ceramic bearings. While having high quality bearings is important, bearing seat fit is also essential. Our CNC machines can precisely machine our bearing seats with extremely low 0.02mm tolerances, guaranteeing a perfect bearing fit, decreasing rolling resistance and further improving the lifespan of the bearings.
