[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”37809″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 46D SS wheelset Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1753855093051{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Rims

In designing the Drive Helix 46D SS wheelset, the goal was to create something that ticked all of the boxes, but at a more competitive price. It had to not only be aero, light, laterally stiff, strong, but also crosswind resistant. To accomplish this, we used our in-house UNI carbon fiber, which is a mixture of our custom resin and genuine Japanese Toray T800 and T1000 carbon fiber. It allows our wheels to be stiff, light, and strong enough to go far beyond the UCI’s vertical impact test. Our patented undulating rim design draws inspiration from the tubercle effect found widely in nature, allowing for a significant improvement in stability in windy conditions.

The wheels are aerodynamically optimized for 700 x 28-30c tires. The front wheel’s wider 31.8mm external width improves airflow around the rim, offering further stability in crosswinds. Both the front and rear rim depths were also chosen specifically to meet the needs of road riders. The Drive Helix 46D SS’s mixed depth wheels allow for the best of both worlds when it comes to aerodynamics, weight, and control.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”37810″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 46D SS Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1724035556911{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1724656281225{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Spokes

No stone was left unturned when designing the Drive Helix 46D SS wheelset. Lightweight Sapim CX-Ray aero bladed spokes are excellent when it comes to performance and strength, while weighing just 4.4 grams each on average.

What makes our spokes special is that they are not only ubiquitous at bike shops around the world, but also trusted and raced by professional road, gravel, and MTB riders around the world. They have a proven track record, and when it comes to steel spokes, Sapim CX-Rays are simply the best.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”37808″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 46D wheelset Performance hub” css=”.vc_custom_1724035587052{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745724044215{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Performance Hubs

What makes the Surface hub unique is its star ratchet engagement system, which we have been using for years on our MTB and TT wheelsets. Just like all of our other hubs, the Surface hub is made by us with 5-axis CNC machines.

High grade precision TPI steel bearings were chosen to improve longevity and reduce rolling resistance. TPI bearings are precise and have low rolling resistance, making them on par with even some ceramic bearings. While having high quality bearings is important, bearing seat fit is also essential. Our CNC machines can precisely machine our bearing seats with extremely low 0.02mm tolerances, guaranteeing a perfect bearing fit, decreasing rolling resistance and further improving the lifespan of the bearings.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”37807″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 46D” css=”.vc_custom_1724035639496{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1724034936283{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Aerodynamic Testing

At Elitewheels, we see value in ensuring what we offer performs rather than just looking good on paper. In addition to the 20+ laboratory test at our factory, we also employ CFD testing as well as real world testing by our pro teams and riders.

CFD (Computational Fluid Dynamics) allows us to aerodynamically optimize wheelsets before even producing the first prototype. During the design phase, we conduct a series of advanced computer simulations that take hundreds of hours each. After our engineering team is satisfied, we are ready for stress testing in our lab.

Once the development of our wheels is finished, we not only test the wheels out ourselves, but we also send them to professional cyclists. We are working with our sponsored UCI continental pro teams and riders, getting their feedback. Their experience riding hundreds of thousands of kilometers each with a large number of wheelsets gives us a unique perspective.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”37851″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1724049371832{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”in the box- Disc brake – Drive Helix SS”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

In order to provide riders with the best wheelsets, we seek to update and improve them as technology advances. Elitewheels reserves the right to change, add or remove the information contained on this website at any time, including equipment, specifications, models, colors, materials, and pricing, without prior notice. The shipped products will be based on the actual order information. Elitewheels thanks you for your understanding and support.

RIM

Elitewheels has left no stone unturned when designing the 29er Gnar Trail’s rim. The asymmetric rim profile of the 29er Gnar Trail leads to better stress balance, greater lateral stiffness, and strength at the spoke holes.

38 layers of carbon fiber are placed at each spoke hole to offer reinforcement. This further improves the strength and stiffness of the rim. The rim bead has been made 17% thicker to improve impact resistance.

In addition, during the rim production process, internal inflatable bladders from a special material are used to produce smoother walls, eliminating wrinkles and voids, allowing for an even stronger and more reliable rim that can be made lighter, as over-engineering is not necessary. We use genuine Toray T700 and T800 carbon fiber, which is superior to generic varieties in terms of weight and impact resistance.

The rims are designed to make fitting tubeless hookless wheels simple, requiring just a floor pump.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”30743″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar Trail Emtb Carbon Wheelset Hub” css=”.vc_custom_1710137148683{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745726233945{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

The Elitewheels Pro hubs are made of 7075 aluminum alloy and feature TPI bearings.

Both the front and rear hubs are forged and then machined using our own Fanuc CNC equipment. The rear hub features a star ratchet with 36 teeth simultaneously engaging, allowing for a high surface area to distribute power, extending the life of the freehub.

Hub servicing has been made easy due to the Pro hub’s minimalistic design and no need for special tools.

DT Swiss hubs are also available.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”14349″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar Trail Emtb Carbon Wheelset Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1677228622494{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1710135660891{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

Sapim CX-Ray spokes come standard. We take precautions to ensure that spoke windup is minimized, so wheels don’t go out of true. After the initial truing, the wheel is stress relieved. This process is repeated again. The wheels are stress relieved a total of 16 times. We see this as an essential quality control standard. As a result, our wheels are guaranteed to stay within 0.2mm of true.

The 3.5mm spoke offset minimizes the right and left spoke tension difference. This makes for a stronger and more laterally stiff wheel, giving you more control.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1698029028762{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner css=”.vc_custom_1698029076216{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/4″ css=”.vc_custom_1698029620783{padding-right: 1% !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”9224″ img_size=”full” onclick=”custom_link” link=”https://www.elite-wheels.com//accessories/”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/4″ css=”.vc_custom_1698029630174{padding-right: 1% !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”9216″ img_size=”full” onclick=”custom_link” link=”https://www.elite-wheels.com//product/extra-freehub-road/”][vc_column_text]

RIMS

Our innovative rim makes use of our unique UNI technology (Learn more about our UNI technology here).

The Drive G45 SS wheelset uses a U-shaped rim which has the aerodynamic advantages of a road wheel. It’s 24mm inner rim width supports 700 x 28-65C tires. This flexibility allows for road riding or gravel riding. The G45 SS is truly a force to be reckoned with regardless of the riding you do. The glossy marble carbon fiber design gives the wheelset a unique and striking appearance.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”21383″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE G45 SS Spoke” css=”.vc_custom_1693821292108{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1727080046201{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

Sapim CX-Ray spokes come standard. We take precautions to ensure that spoke windup is minimized so wheels don’t go out of true. After the initial truing, the wheel is sideloaded. This process is repeated again. The wheels are sideloaded a total of 16 times. We see this as an essential quality control standard. As a result, our wheels are guaranteed to stay within 0.2mm of true.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”21381″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE G45 SS HUB” css=”.vc_custom_1693821402992{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1747279512123{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

The Drive G45 SS wheelset includes a custom, high-end hub that uses a double-walled waterproof design. The hub flanges have been specifically designed to be simple and practical in form. This makes for easy cleaning of the hub after riding in muddy conditions.
As the hub uses premium ceramic bearings for less rolling resistance. Using these allows for a much longer service life as compared to steel bearings.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”21380″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE G45 SS Bearings” css=”.vc_custom_1693821427886{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1694481394965{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CERAMIC BEARINGS

Both the front and rear hubs of the Drive G45 SS use hybrid ceramic bearings. The efficiency of the ceramic bearings will make it so that you can save extra watts even after years of riding.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”22720″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1698287551482{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}”][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

Synergy

Our philosophy is that wheels should be complimentary. For this reason, we have created a complete time trial and triathlon wheelset.

Our Velo TT Disc wheel comes as the result of our years of research and design into aero time trial wheels. It is our next-generation offering is designed to provide marginal gains, saving you precious time.

The Velo 8 is an 82mm, deep-section wheel that builds off what we have developed before. It is our solution for what a high-performance TT wheel should be.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”11083″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”TT Rim Brake Bundle Aerodynamics”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1731739100200{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Aerodynamics

While disc wheels are accepted as being the most aero choices, not all are made the same. The wheel comes with a new valve hole cover that makes the wheel even more streamline.

It is well known that the wheel, tire combination can have a significant impact on aerodynamics. The Velo TT Disc and Velo 8 are both designed to optimized to be used with wider road tires. To get the maximum aerodynamic benefit, we recommend they are used with 23mm or 25mm tires.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”11085″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”TT Rim Brake Bundle Tech” css=”.vc_custom_1663920014463{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1731739111567{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Tech

The Velo TT Disc is a next generation TT wheel that offers more than just aerodynamics. Its specially machined high-density aerospace PMI core not only serves the purpose of making the wheel light, but also exceptionally stiff. As opposed to the typical honeycomb-type core used in many disc wheels, the PMI core allows it to be stronger and more resistant to impacts. It is fatigue resistant, meaning you can continue to use it season after season without any drop in performance.

The Velo 8’s hub features 6803 ceramic bearings to reduce rolling resistance, saving you watts. The wheel also incorporates a U/V rim profile that isn’t strictly focuses on aerodynamics. Deep section wheels are more susceptible to crosswinds. Having this design will help you maintain control regardless of the conditions.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”7238″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1647421242402{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”XC3 mountain wheels”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”7226″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Elitewheels 29ER PRO33 Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745724314764{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

RIM

During the rim production process, internal inflatable bladders from a special material are used to produce smoother walls, resulting in a lighter rim. These bladders are then completely removed without the use of harsh chemicals through the valve hole. Our unique manufacturing process makes is so that the rim does not have to be patched to extract the bladders like traditional manufacturers. This significantly improves the strength of the rims.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”7225″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Elitewheels 29ER PRO33 Rim type” css=”.vc_custom_1647423264719{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1663139807448{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

RIM TYPE

We use both genuine Toray T700 and T800 carbon fiber which is superior to generic carbon fiber used by many manufacturers. The two types of carbon fiber are used in different places to increase the wheel’s strength to weight ratio while reducing lateral and radial forces as well as increasing impact resistance.

The rims have also been specifically designed to make sealing tubeless tires using a floor pump easy.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”7224″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Elitewheels 29ER PRO33 Hub” css=”.vc_custom_1647423345146{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745726193679{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

The Elitewheels Pro hub comes standard and features Taiwanese TPI bearings. Both the front and rear hubs are made of 7075 aluminum alloy. The lightweight freebody features a ratchet system with 36 teeth.

DT Swiss hubs are also available.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”7227″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Elitewheels 29ER PRO33 Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1647423407038{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1663139862153{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKE

Sapim CX-Ray spokes come standard. We take precautions to ensure that spoke windup is minimized so wheels don’t go out of true. After the initial truing, the wheel is sideloaded. This process is repeated again. The wheels are sideloaded a total of 16 times. We see this as an essential quality control standard. As a result, our wheels are guaranteed to stay within 0.2mm of true.

The 3.2mm spoke offset minimizes the right and left spoke tension difference. This makes for a stonger and more laterally stiff wheel giving you more control.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”37826″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 57D wheelset Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1724487386030{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Rims

In designing the Drive Helix 57D SS wheelset, the goal was to create something that ticked all of the boxes. It had to not only be aero, light, laterally stiff, strong, but also crosswind resistant. To accomplish this, we used our in-house UNI carbon fiber, which is a mixture of our custom resin and genuine Japanese Toray T800 and T1000 carbon fiber. It allows our wheels to be stiff, light, and strong enough to go far beyond the UCI’s vertical impact test. Our patented undulating rim design draws inspiration from the tubercle effect found widely in nature, allowing for a significant improvement in stability in windy conditions.

The wheels are aerodynamically optimized for 28-30mm tires. The front wheel’s wider 31.8mm external width improves airflow around the rim, offering further stability in crosswinds. Both the front and rear rim depths were also chosen specifically to meet the needs of road riders. The Drive Helix 57D SS’s mixed depth wheels allow for the best of both worlds when it comes to aerodynamics, weight, and control.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”37827″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Helix 57D Carbon Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1724120031345{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1724656330832{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Spokes

No stone was left unturned when designing the Drive Helix 57D SS wheelset. Lightweight Sapim CX-Ray aero bladed spokes are excellent when it comes to performance and strength, while weighing just 4.4 grams each on average.

What makes our spokes special is that they are not only ubiquitous at bike shops around the world, but also trusted and raced by professional road, gravel, and MTB riders around the world. They have a proven track record, and when it comes to steel spokes, Sapim CX-Rays are simply the best.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”37825″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Helix 57D Performance hub” css=”.vc_custom_1724120060706{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745724266809{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Hubs

What makes the Surface hub unique is its star ratchet engagement system, which we have been using for years on our MTB and TT wheelsets. Just like all of our other hubs, the Surface hub is made by us with 5-axis CNC machines.

High grade precision TPI steel bearings were chosen to improve longevity and reduce rolling resistance. TPI bearings are precise and have low rolling resistance, making them on par with even some ceramic bearings. While having high quality bearings is important, bearing seat fit is also essential. Our CNC machines can precisely machine our bearing seats with extremely low 0.02mm tolerances, guaranteeing a perfect bearing fit, decreasing rolling resistance and further improving the lifespan of the bearings.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”37824″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Helix 57D” css=”.vc_custom_1724120085072{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1724037303997{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

Aerodynamic Testing

At Elitewheels, we see value in ensuring what we offer performs rather than just looking good on paper. In addition to the 20+ laboratory test at our factory, we also employ CFD testing as well as real world testing by our pro teams and riders.

CFD (Computational Fluid Dynamics) allows us to aerodynamically optimize wheelsets before even producing the first prototype. During the design phase, we conduct a series of advanced computer simulations that take hundreds of hours each. After our engineering team is satisfied, we are ready for stress testing in our lab.

Once the development of our wheels is finished, we not only test the wheels out ourselves, but we also send them to professional cyclists. We are working with our sponsored UCI continental pro teams and riders, getting their feedback. Their experience riding hundreds of thousands of kilometers each with a large number of wheelsets gives us a unique perspective.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”37851″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1724049316204{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”in the box- Disc brake – Drive Helix SS”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

excerpt.rendered:
The Drive Helix 57D SS was designed to be an all-round performance wheelset. It is perfect for those who want a balance of aerodynamics and lightweight for both the climbs, the flats, and everything in between. Drawing inspiration from our popular steel spoke gravel Drive wheelset, the 57D SS uses Sapim CX-Ray spokes, which are not only lightweight but are also aerodynamic. The wheelset also features our own UNI carbon fiber as well as TPI steel bearings. What sets these new wheels apart isn’t just our tried and tested ratchet hubs and high quality steel hubs and bearings, but also our innovative undulating rim design, whose unique profile results in helical-shaped laminar flow when out riding.

– Sapim CX-Ray Steel Spokes
– Disc Brake Wheelset
– Brake Interface: Center Lock by default
– Axle: Thru axle by default (Need QR adapters?)

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”52248″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive G36″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1753869313321{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]WIDER RIMS

The Drive G36 features a wider 25mm internal rim width, that allows you to run wider, 700 x 28-65C tires, giving you more traction and confidence when riding. This flexibility allows for both road riding and trail riding. Advancements in carbon fiber layup have made it possible to reduce weight while further improving impact resistance.

The rims use an ETRTO-compliant reduced hook design that gives the benefits of a hookless rim, without sacrificing safety at higher tire pressures. The reduced hook design increases durability, creates a better tire contact patch for improved grip and stability, reduces weight, and improves aerodynamics due to an enhanced tire-to-rim interface.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”52249″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive G36 Ratchet Hubs” css=”.vc_custom_1742433615314{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1742457749827{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]RATCHET HUBS

The Drive G36’s features our new Kinetic hub, which contains two high engagement 50T(7.2°) star ratchets machined into a conical shape, which allows for a increase in surface area. This leads to increased longevity and durability, as torque can be distributed over a larger area. The Kinetic hub also makes use of a stronger spring, which reduces skipping and slipping under load.

The front and rear hubs both make use of hybrid Steel TPI bearings, which offer performance gains in rolling resistance, saving you precious watts. We machine our own high-precision hubs in-house with Fanuc CNC machines to tolerances of just 0.02mm, improving longevity. The hubs also feature waterproof seals to eliminate ingress, preventing bearing contamination.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”52251″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive G36 Race-Ready Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1742433648118{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1741592004031{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]RACE-READY SPOKES

Sapim CX-Ray, spokes are known for being lightweight and durable, making them the favorite of pro riders. We take precautions to ensure that spoke windup is minimized so wheels don’t go out of true. After the initial truing, the wheel is sideloaded. This process is repeated again. The wheels are sideloaded a total of 16 times. We see this as an essential quality control standard. As a result, our wheels are guaranteed to stay within 0.2mm of true.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”52243″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive G36 Durability” css=”.vc_custom_1742433663654{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1741592012785{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]DURABILITY

At Elitewheels, we do all of our own testing. During the development phase, each wheelset undergoes more than 20 tests. The Drive G36 has flawlessly passed our 20,000km rough surface factory/laboratory tests which simulate gravel riding conditions, far exceeding the en 17406 test standard.

In our maximum vertical impact test, the G36 passed, making it 2.7x stronger than UCI’s standard, giving you peace of mind when riding in rough terrain.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1698029028762{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner css=”.vc_custom_1698029076216{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1698029620783{padding-right: 1% !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”9224″ img_size=”full” onclick=”custom_link” link=”https://www.elite-wheels.com//accessories/”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1698029630174{padding-right: 1% !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”9216″ img_size=”full” onclick=”custom_link” link=”https://www.elite-wheels.com//product/extra-freehub-road/”][vc_column_text]

excerpt.rendered:
The Drive G36 represents the next generation of gravel wheels. It features a reduced hook design, offering the benefits of a hookless wheelset with the security of a clincher. New advancements in carbon fiber layup have made it possible for us to design the wheelset to not only be stronger than those of the last generation but also lighter at just 1325 grams for the pair.
The G36 is also the first to feature our high- engagement ratchet hub, which includes TPI Steel bearings. Taking things further, the wheelset is made with race-ready Sapim CX-Ray spokes.

 – Intended Use: Gravel / Road
 – Brake Interface: Center Lock by default

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”58136″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar XC Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1749621925685{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

RIM

The Gnar XC rim features an asymmetric design that enhances stress balance and improves lateral stiffness. Designed for modern tubeless setups, the hookless rim allows for effortless installation—requiring only a standard floor pump. The carbon layup is crafted from genuine Toray T700 and T800 fibers, delivering an exceptional strength-to-weight ratio and outstanding impact resistance. Thanks to internal inflatable bladder molding, each rim boasts a smooth, wrinkle-free interior surface and consistent structure. With these innovations, the Gnar XC achieves a total wheelset weight of just 1320g ±30g, offering significant weight savings without compromising on durability or stiffness.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”58140″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar XC Hub” css=”.vc_custom_1749621976786{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1750067025164{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

At the core of the Gnar XC is the Elitewheels Pro hub, precision-machined from high-grade 7075 aluminum alloy. CNC-finished in-house, these hubs offer exceptional strength, tight tolerances, and long-term reliability. The newly upgraded 50T star ratchet system delivers faster engagement, improved power transfer, and enhanced durability while keeping the hub weight at a lightweight 346g (HG). Maintenance is simplified through a tool-free, minimalist design. High-performance TPI steel bearings ensure smooth rolling performance in the toughest conditions.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”58141″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”29er Gnar XC Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1749622060941{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1769482852805{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

Sapim CX-Ray spokes come standard. We take precautions to ensure that spoke windup is minimized so wheels don’t go out of true. After the initial truing, the wheel is sideloaded. This process is repeated. Each wheel undergoes an intensive quality control process, including 16 cycles of stress relief, ensuring a maximum deviation of just 0.2mm from true. Combined with Sapim Secure Lock nipples, the result is a reliable and precisely built wheelset that stays true ride after ride.
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1698029028762{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner css=”.vc_custom_1698029076216{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/4″ css=”.vc_custom_1698029620783{padding-right: 1% !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”9224″ img_size=”full” onclick=”custom_link” link=”https://www.elite-wheels.com//accessories/”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/4″ css=”.vc_custom_1698029630174{padding-right: 1% !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”9216″ img_size=”full” onclick=”custom_link” link=”https://www.elite-wheels.com//product/extra-freehub-road/”][vc_column_text]

The 29er Gnar XC Carbon wheelset is designed for XC disciplines. It has a modern rim shape featuring an asymmetrical profile with a 30mm internal width. Paired with Elitewheels’s upgraded 50T Ratchet, the Gnar XC excels on even the most technical terrain, offering instant power transfer.

Brake Interface: The wheels come standard in a 6-bolt configuration.

*Please kind note that riding that goes beyond the scope intended for this wheelset will void its warranty.

*Availability Status:

1）Silver decals, usually shipped in 7-10 days.;

2) Black decals on backorder, usually shipped in 30-45 days.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”8906″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1654047310967{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”DRIVE 50D Banner”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”12048″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Mixed Depth Wheel Bundle wheelset Rims”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745723937833{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

DRIVE RIMS

A Elitewheels, we design our Drive wheels to match the needs of professional riders. In order to deliver the best, we incorporate our own in-house UNI carbon fiber, a specific ratio of T700 and T800 carbon fiber (*Read more about UNI technology), making it not only strong, but also especially light and stiff. The U/V-shaped rim profile of the Drive DB Mixed Depth wheels was chosen to make the rims aero as well as stable in windy conditions. The 21mm inner rim width can accommodate wider tires for those looking for more grip and comfort.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”12049″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Mixed Depth Wheel Bundle Carbon Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1669001435907{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1697620090939{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CARBON SPOKES

What separates Drive wheels from most others is its use of high-modulus carbon spokes. The 3.3mm wide aero bladed spokes offer a 7% increase lateral response as compared to equivalent steel spokes. The spokes are mechanically secured, giving the benefit of being able to be trued and maintained just like regular spokes. Anti-loosening technology is also incorporated into the spoke nipples. The threads built into the nipples give it a double-locking effect.

*Read more about CARBON SPOKES.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625730552{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”12050″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Mixed Depth Wheel Bundle hub” css=”.vc_custom_1669001592578{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1745723948034{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

PERFORMANCE HUB

To get the most out of carbon fiber spokes, we specifically designed the hubs with high flanges to further increase lateral stiffness and improve handling. Elitewheels manufactures its own hubs with Fanuc CNC machines, allowing for a tolerance of 0.02mm. This accuracy is important for bearing longevity and low rolling resistance.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”12051″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”Drive Mixed Depth Wheel Bundle Ceramic Bearings” css=”.vc_custom_1669001706143{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1697620132573{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CERAMIC BEARINGS

The Drive front hub uses two 6803 mixed ceramic bearings. The Drive rear hub uses one 6903 and three 6803 mixed ceramic bearings. These large bearings offer better rigidity. The use of mixed ceramic bearings will allow you to have a more efficient bike, saving you precious watts.

*Read more about ceramic bearings.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636435287316{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”12032″ img_size=”full” css=”.vc_custom_1668761782509{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;}” title=”in the box disc brake drive”][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

In order to provide riders with the best wheelsets, we seek to update and improve them as technology advances. Elitewheels reserves the right to change, add or remove the information contained on this website at any time, including equipment, specifications, models, colors, materials, and pricing, without prior notice. The shipped products will be based on the actual order information. Elitewheels thanks you for your understanding and support.

excerpt.rendered:
Having a mixed depth wheelset can improve the aerodynamics and handling of a bike. A shallower front wheel can make a bike easier to control as it is more resistant to crosswinds, while a deep section rear wheel can reduce aerodynamic drag. Mixed depth wheels are the favorite or many pro and experienced riders, as it can make for a more balanced ride.

Now we give riders the choice to customize their own wheelset, allowing for the front and rear wheel rim depths to be selected independently.

– Carbon Spoke Disc Brake Wheelset
– Brake Interface: Center Lock by default
– Axle: Thru axle by default (Need QR adapters?)

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days.

DRIVE RIMS

At Elitewheels, we design our Drive wheels to match the needs of professional riders. The Drive 65D’s 21mm inner rim allows for wider tires to be run, allowing for more comfort and grip.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”9929″ img_size=”full” onclick=”link_image” title=”DRIVE 65D Spokes” css=”.vc_custom_1659344172478{margin-top: -10px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1687764780040{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

CARBON SPOKES

What separates the Drive 65D from most other wheels is its use of high-modulus carbon spokes. The Drive 65D is dedicated to those who want a wheelset that is aero. It can give you the advantage you need when riding on the flats as well as on descents. It is tubeless ready and has the added benefit of having a 21mm internal rim width. The Drive 65D is for those who want a pro-level wheelset. It comes in at only 1460g for the pair.

– Disc Brake Wheelset

– Axle: Thru axle by default (Need QR adapters?)

– Custom option for different rim depths

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days.

excerpt.rendered:
The Drive 40D is dedicated to those who want an all-rounder that is more geared towards riding in the hills and mountains. The wheelset features carbon spokes, light and stiff UNI carbon fiber as well as high precision, ceramic bearing hubs. It is tubeless ready and has the added benefit of having a 21mm internal rim width. The Drive 40D is for those who want a pro-level wheelset. It comes in at only 1260g for the pair.

– Carbon Spoke Wheelset
– Disc Brake Wheelset
– Brake Interface: Center Lock by default
– Axle: Thru axle by default (Need QR adapters?)

– Custom option for different rim depths

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”52307″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1742291571906{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

RIMS

Drive II wheelsets feature wider, 23mm inner widths and 31mm outer widths, making them aerodynamically optimized for 28c-30c tires. Wider tires allow for a more comfortable ride, as they can be run at lower pressures. The wider inner rim width gives wider tires a better shape, improving grip and comfort, while the 31mm external widths improve the overall aerodynamics when paired with 28mm or 30mm tires, which are now the norm in road cycling.

What makes our clincher, tubeless-ready rims unique is that we use a reduced hook design. We see the benefits and drawbacks of standard hooked as well as hookless rims and have found a way to offer the best of both worlds. Our ETRTO-compliant reduced hooks allow for the aerodynamic, durability, and optimal tire shape that hookless rims provide with the security, tire compatibility, and ability to run higher pressures that a clincher can offer.

Despite the increase in widths, we were able to keep the same weights as the original Drive wheelsets. This was accomplished in part due to our new advancements in our UNI carbon fiber layup technology.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”51724″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1742547842772{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

In the Drive II wheels, we are using 4.5mm aero bladed carbon spokes. As opposed bonded carbon spokes, ours are as easily replaceable as their steel counterparts. Each spoke weighs roughly 3 grams each. In our laboratory testing, they have proven to be 8% more laterally stiff than steel spoke, leading to more efficient power transfer when riding, saving you watts.

The carbon spokes on the Drive II wheelsets do not experience spoke twist, meaning they will always remain in the most aerodynamic position, guaranteeing you always get the same high level of performance. Our carbon spokes have been proven reliable and durable for over three years in the pro peloton by our sponsored UCI ProTeam and Continental teams.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”51722″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1744281216711{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

KINETIC RATCHET HUB

The Drive II road wheelsets features our brand new, Kinetic hub, which uses a 50T star ratchet mechanism,instead of the previous pawl-ratchet mechanism. Kinetic’s ratchets are machined in a conical shape, allowing for increased engagement surface area which increases longevity. A new, stronger spring reduces the likelihood of skipping and slipping, ensuring a consistent riding experience.

The hub also features a new waterproof seal reducing the likelihood of ingress. A stronger spring has also been chosen, which significantly reduces the incidence of ratchets slipping and skipping when pedaling.

Just like all of our other designs, the Kinetic hub is made by us using 5-axis CNC machines. High-grade precision S&S ceramic bearings were chosen to improve their lifespan and reduce rolling resistance, saving you precious watts. While having high quality bearings is important, a perfect bearing seat fit is essential for optimal performance. Our CNC machines precisely machine bearing seats to 0.02mm tolerances, guaranteeing exceptionally low rolling resistance and improving longevity.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”51847″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1742454692194{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

TESTING

At Elitewheels, we see value in ensuring what we offer not only performs well but has excellent durability and longevity. Each wheelset undergoes more than 20+ laboratory tests at our factory including various durability, longevity, and stiffness tests. We also ensure each wheel passes the UCI Vertical Impact Test, which gives the green light for wheels to be used at the top levels of professional racing.

Besides the laboratory tests, we put a strong emphasis on aerodynamic and real world testing. Our engineers run CFD (Computational Fluid Dyamics) programs for hundreds of hours during the design phase to aerodynamically optimize wheelsets before even producing the first prototype. After our engineering team is satisfied and the prototype is ready, we conduct wind tunnel testing to verify the results as well as real world testing by our staff and our sponsored UCI pro cycling teams, getting as much feedback as possible. The pro riders offer a unique perspective due to their hundreds of thousands of kilometers of riding experience with a large number of wheelsets.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1692596541997{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1692597610063{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″ css=”.vc_custom_1692597636464{background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1692597620719{background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1704865934342{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

excerpt.rendered:
Having a mixed depth wheelset can improve the aerodynamics and handling of a bike. A shallower front wheel can make a bike easier to control as it is more resistant to crosswinds, while a deep section rear wheel can reduce aerodynamic drag. Mixed depth wheels are the favorite or many pro and experienced riders, as it can make for a more balanced ride.

Now we give riders the choice to customize their own wheelset, allowing for the front and rear wheel rim depths to be selected independently.

– Intended Use: Road
– Carbon Spoke Wheelset
– Disc Brake Wheelset
– Brake Interface: Center Lock by default
– Axle: Thru axle by default

*Availability Status: On backorder, usually shipped in 20-30 days

excerpt.rendered:
After years of research and development, our engineers have made advancements in maximizing a rim’s durability and responsiveness without adding material, allowing for the next generation of Drive wheels to remain lightweight, despite increasing inner and outer rim widths to support wider tires.

The Drive 65D II is the epitome of aero. It’s deep section rims significantly reduce drag, making it ideal for the flats and rolling hills, weighing just 1460 grams for the pair. The U/V-shaped rim profile improves lateral airflow, increasing stability on fast descents and in windy conditions.

In addition to optimizing the rim design, the second generation of Drive wheels comes with several upgrades, namely ETRTO-compliant reduced hooks to offer better aerodynamics, comfort, and traction, quality S&S ceramic bearings, 4.5mm carbon spokes, and our one-of-a-kind Kinetic hub, which features a conical ratchet design.

– Intended Use: Road
– Carbon Spoke Wheelset
– Disc Brake Wheelset
– Brake Interface: Center Lock by default
– Axle: Thru axle by default

*Availability Status: On backorder, usually shipped in 35-45 days.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636522597176{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625660188{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1636524634550{margin-top: -10px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_single_image image=”52307″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1742291571906{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

RIMS

Drive II wheelsets feature wider, 23mm inner widths and 31mm outer widths, making them aerodynamically optimized for 28c and 30c tires. Wider tires allow for a more comfortable ride, as they can be run at lower pressures. The wider inner rim width gives wider tires a better shape, improving grip and comfort, while the 31mm external widths improve the overall aerodynamics when paired with 28mm or 30mm tires, which are now the norm in road cycling.

What makes our clincher, tubeless-ready rims unique is that we use a reduced hook design. We see the benefits and drawbacks of standard hooked as well as hookless rims and have found a way to offer the best of both worlds. Our ETRTO-compliant reduced hooks allow for the aerodynamic, durability, and optimal tire shape that hookless rims provide with the security, tire compatibility, and ability to run higher pressures that a clincher can offer.

Despite the increase in widths, we were able to keep the same weights as the original Drive wheelsets. This was accomplished in part due to our new advancements in our UNI carbon fiber layup technology.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625761971{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”51724″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1742547842772{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

SPOKES

In the Drive II wheels, we are using 4.5mm aero bladed carbon spokes. As opposed bonded carbon spokes, ours are as easily replaceable as their steel counterparts. Each spoke weighs roughly 3 grams each. In our laboratory testing, they have proven to be 8% more laterally stiff than steel spoke, leading to more efficient power transfer when riding, saving you watts.

The carbon spokes on the Drive II wheelsets do not experience spoke twist, meaning they will always remain in the most aerodynamic position, guaranteeing you always get the same high level of performance. Our carbon spokes have been proven reliable and durable for over three years in the pro peloton by our sponsored UCI ProTeam and Continental teams.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”51722″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1744281216711{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

KINETIC RATCHET HUB

The Drive II road wheelsets features our brand new, Kinetic hub, which uses a 50T star ratchet mechanism,instead of the previous pawl-ratchet mechanism. Kinetic’s ratchets are machined in a conical shape, allowing for increased engagement surface area which increases longevity. A new, stronger spring reduces the likelihood of skipping and slipping, ensuring a consistent riding experience.

The hub also features a new waterproof seal reducing the likelihood of ingress. A stronger spring has also been chosen, which significantly reduces the incidence of ratchets slipping and skipping when pedaling.

Just like all of our other designs, the Kinetic hub is made by us using 5-axis CNC machines. High-grade precision S&S ceramic bearings were chosen to improve their lifespan and reduce rolling resistance, saving you precious watts. While having high quality bearings is important, a perfect bearing seat fit is essential for optimal performance. Our CNC machines precisely machine bearing seats to 0.02mm tolerances, guaranteeing exceptionally low rolling resistance and improving longevity.

Discover the Hub Sound Here[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1636436261896{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1636625782773{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #f0f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”51721″ img_size=”full”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1742454692194{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

TESTING

At Elitewheels, we see value in ensuring what we offer not only performs well but has excellent durability and longevity. Each wheelset undergoes more than 20+ laboratory tests at our factory including various durability, longevity, and stiffness tests. We also ensure each wheel passes the UCI Vertical Impact Test, which gives the green light for wheels to be used at the top levels of professional racing.

Besides the laboratory tests, we put a strong emphasis on aerodynamic and real world testing. Our engineers run CFD (Computational Fluid Dyamics) programs for hundreds of hours during the design phase to aerodynamically optimize wheelsets before even producing the first prototype. After our engineering team is satisfied and the prototype is ready, we conduct wind tunnel testing to verify the results as well as real world testing by our staff and our sponsored UCI pro cycling teams, getting as much feedback as possible. The pro riders offer a unique perspective due to their hundreds of thousands of kilometers of riding experience with a large number of wheelsets.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1692596541997{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1692597610063{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″ css=”.vc_custom_1692597636464{background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1692597620719{background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1704865934342{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

In order to provide riders with the best wheelsets, we seek to update and improve them as technology advances. Laboratory Tests
Each wheelset undergoes more than 20 laboratory tests at our factory, covering durability, longevity, and stiffness. We also ensure every wheel passes the UCI Vertical Impact Test, certifying it for use in top-tier professional racing.

Silverstone Wind Tunnel Test
We tested the Drive II at the Silverstone Engineering Hub in the UK. The results showed a 2.84% reduction in CdA (Coefficient of Drag Area), translating to less air resistance and higher speed at the same power output. At a -15° yaw angle, the Drive 50D II saved 5.2 watts compared to its predecessor at the same speed.

CFD Simulation & Real-World Testing
In addition to lab testing, we place a strong focus on aerodynamics and real-world performance. Our engineers run hundreds of hours of CFD (Computational Fluid Dynamics) simulations during the design phase to optimize aerodynamics before building the first prototype.
We also conduct extensive real-world testing with our in-house team and sponsored UCI pro cycling teams. Their feedback, based on hundreds of thousands of kilometers of riding experience with various wheelsets, helps us continuously refine and improve our products.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1692596541997{margin-right: -5% !important;margin-left: -5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1692597610063{margin-right: 5% !important;margin-left: 5% !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″ css=”.vc_custom_1692597636464{background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1692597620719{background-color: #ffffff !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1704865934342{margin-right: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;padding-right: 5px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;}”]

excerpt.rendered:
After years of research and development, our engineers have made advancements in maximizing a rim’s durability and responsiveness without adding material, allowing for the next generation of Drive wheels to remain lightweight, despite increasing inner and outer rim widths to support wider tires.

The Drive 36D II was designed to be the perfect climbing wheelset, weighing just 1260 grams for the pair.The U/V-shaped rim profile improves lateral airflow, increasing stability on fast descents and in windy conditions.

In addition to optimizing the rim design, the second generation of Drive wheels comes with several upgrades, namely ETRTO-compliant reduced hooks to offer better aerodynamics, comfort, and traction, quality S&S ceramic bearings, 4.5mm carbon spokes, and our one-of-a-kind Kinetic hub, which features a conical ratchet design.

– Intended Use: Road
– Carbon Spoke Wheelset
– Disc Brake Wheelset
– Brake Interface: Center Lock by default
– Axle: Thru axle by default

*Availability Status: Usually shipped in 7-10 days.
